User.title: User
User.description: Represents a student user account on the PrepStack platform. Stores profile information and references to personalized data.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity (Firebase UID).

customId.description: A unique 10-character alphanumeric user ID chosen by the user for login purposes.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

email.description: The email address associated with the account (mapped to customId@prepstack.local).

enrollmentStatus.description: The subscription level of the student.

/customUserIds/{customId}.description: Lookup collection to ensure global uniqueness of custom 10-character IDs.
